findings.description: The 環境構築 h2 section contains 3 h3 subsections (バックアップ用スキーマの作成、コンポーネント設定ファイルに監視対象テーブルを記載、ログ出力設定) and its plain text exceeds 2000 characters, but the knowledge file consolidates all of this into a single section s4 rather than splitting into separate sections.
findings.source_evidence: RST source has h3 headings: 'バックアップ用スキーマの作成、データ投入', 'コンポーネント設定ファイルに監視対象テーブルを記載' (with sub-section '設定項目一覧' and '設定例'), and 'ログ出力設定' (with sub-sections 'app-log.properties' and 'log.properties'). Combined plain text including tables and code blocks far exceeds 2000 characters.
